title: Xenial Xanthous French Chicken Blanquette
description: A light and refreshing French dish made with dashi extract and ground nutmeg, perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: dashi extract
ingredients.notes: optional, but adds depth of flavor

ingredients.name: heavy cream
ingredients.notes: whole milk or half-and-half can be substituted

ingredients.name: white wine vinegar
ingredients.notes: such as white wine vinegar or apple cider vinegar

ingredients.name: salt
ingredients.notes: use a flaky sea salt or kosher salt

instructions: Heat the butter in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the gluten-free flour and cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
Slowly pour in the heavy cream, whisking constantly to prevent lumps.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 2 minutes, or until it thickens slightly.
Add the dashi extract, if using, and stir to combine.
Add the chicken to the saucepan and cook, stirring occasionally, until the chicken is cooked through, about 5-7 minutes.
Season the sauce with salt, then add the white wine vinegar and stir to combine.
Serve the chicken and sauce hot, garnished with chopped parsley if desired.
